heading: Compilation and publication of data
label: 7133 Compilation and publication of data
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1978 Amendment note under .Oct. 13, 1978section 907 of Pub. L. 95–454section 1101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 90 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1978 Amendment note under .Oct. 13, 1978section 907 of Pub. L. 95–454section 1101 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Authority shall maintain a file of its proceedings and copies of all available agreements and arbitration decisions, and shall publish the texts of its decisions and the actions taken by the Panel under .section 7119 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: All files maintained under subsection (a) of this section shall be open to inspection and reproduction in accordance with the provisions of sections 552 and 552a of this title.
